title: Professional Metal Spatula for Cast Iron Skillets and Flat Top Grills, Full Tang Wooden Handle, Stainless Steel Blade, Smash Burger Spatula Turner for Flipper, Cooking, BBQ, 5 Inch x 3 Inch
features: High Quality Stainless Steel: This metal spatula is made of thickened and hardened stainless steel, perfect for cast iron skillets, and smashing burger.
Ergonomic Full Tang Handle: Our stainless steel spatula has a full tang wooden handle, it is heat resistant, ergonomic and durable
Sophisticated design & Manufacturing: with precision beveled straight edge,and round corners, it is your optimal choice for food release without scratching your cookwares.
Hardened Stainless Steel: Build with Stainless steel materials with hardness addition treatment, No worry for even cast iron skillet surface leveling.
Heavy Duty Construction: this Xiaozu metal spatula is built with thickened stiff heavy gauge steel, which can eliminate flex for smashing burgers and tough scraping tasks.
description: Product Description A Strong Spatula to Meet Your Needs High Quality Pro Metal Spatula Heavy Gauge Stainless Steel Thickened Stainless Steel eliminates flex even when pressing burger, resists rust and corrosion, and smoothes the natural rough texture of cast iron. Precision Beveled Edge A strong metal spatula with thin scraping edges, completes tough tasks well. Flat edge for even cast iron surface leveling and optimal food release. Full Tang Wooden Handle Durable, no BREAK! Stays cool to the touch, won't melt on the edge of hot skillets, and is tapered for a comfortable & secure grip. Hand wash only. Round Corners This spatula is manufactured with thoughtful design, 2 corners are rounded, to prevent it from scratching your favorite cookwares.
